CacheNews.Title: Valve will finally let you build your own Steam Machine with SteamOS for desktop
CacheNews.Summary: If you don't get lucky with Valve's Steam Machine reservation system, you can make your own Steam Machine instead. Valve says that "starting with the SteamOS 3.8 release, you can put together your own Steam Machine using whatever PC parts you want."
